TextENGNew: "...Kyaaaaaah!!"
A piercing scream tore through the night, snapping me back to my senses.
"Th-that voice...?!"
"--Towada-san!"
All of us outside the ritual storehouse broke into a run toward the source of the scream.
The voice hadn't come from the assembly hall.
It was from the direction of the torii gate...!
*splash* *splash* *splash* *splash*...
We sprinted across the rain-soaked shrine grounds.
The flashlight in Otobe's hand illuminated the weathered torii gate ahead.
Towada-san was sitting alone on the ground, her back pressed against the pillar of the torii gate.
"Towada-san?!"
Towada-san slowly turned toward us.
Her eyes were hollow, vacant — as if her very soul had been drained away.
"Are you all right...?"
Miyuki-chan rushed to Towada-san's side and quickly assessed her condition.
"No external injuries.@k@vS10/40/410300442. Does anything hurt?"
"Towada-san... what happened?"
I crouched down in front of Towada-san and asked as gently as I could.
But Towada-san could do nothing but tremble violently, her whole body shaking.
"...Towada-san?"
I couldn't make out what she was trying to say.
I looked to Miyuki-chan for help, but she just shook her head with a grave expression.
Towada-san's large eyes were brimming with tears, on the verge of spilling over.
"The car... is...!"
"Towada-san, try to stay with us.@k@vS10/40/410300444. ...You're safe now."
Towada-san was desperately trying to tell us something, but the words wouldn't come.
Miyuki-chan wrapped her arms around Towada-san's shoulders.
But her slender, fragile body kept trembling in small, ceaseless shivers — as though she might break apart at any moment.
"What happened...?"
"The... the car..."
"What about the car?@k@vS10/62/410100615. Wait — where's that guy?@k@vS10/62/410100616. ...Kurosawa, was it?"
Towada-san couldn't finish the sentence. She clamped both hands over her mouth.
"Towada-san...?!@k@vS10/62/410100618. What happened to Kurosawa?!"
"Towada-san...?!"
"...No need to rush."
Before I realized it, Sonozaki-san came over and knelt down beside Towada-san.
She spoke to Towada-san in a more tender voice than I'd ever heard out of her.
"Relax...@k@vS10/43/410400174. Now, slowly take a deep breath."
"It's ok... you're all right now...@k@vS10/43/410400176. There's no need to panic..."
Towada-san continued sobbing, while Sonozaki-san gently patted her on the back.
Eventually, Towada-san managed to get her breathing under control... and then she squeezed out a few words.
"Demoned...a...way..."
"Huh?"
"D... demoned away...!"
"Are you saying... Kurosawa-san was demoned away?"
Towada-san deeply nodded in agreement. Then she tightened her lips and lowered her head, terrified of whatever event she had just experienced.
"...So, what happened? Take your time and tell us."
"When... was Kurosawa demoned away?"
In due time,
Towada-san finally started to calm down. She took a couple deep breaths... then slowly began speaking in a fragile voice...
"After you left...@k@vS10/42/410600094. Right after you left, Takumi-kun finally woke up...@k@vS10/42/410600095. We decided it was time to go home..."
"...And then?"
Kurosawa got drunk and slept for a really long time, but the two of them originally planned this to be a one-day trip.
Once Towada-san and Kurosawa left the assembly hall, they walked straight through the shrine grounds toward their car...

"...I heard that you were all going to the ritual storehouse, so I thought it would be appropriate to say farewell...@k@vS10/42/410600097. But Takumi-kun looked upset, somehow... so I didn't insist on it..."
"I think... he was probably... just embarrassed about sleeping so long..."
Then Kurosawa took Towada-san by the hand and the two of them walked right past the ritual storehouse.
"And then... the two of us came through this gate... and headed down the stone steps."
But after descending the steps for a while... they were shocked by what they found.
"The car that we drove here in... had vanished...!"
"The car... disappeared...?!"
Otobe gasped, then turned back toward us.
"Come on, that's..."
"...Just like what happened to Otobe?"
"Demoned away...?@k@vS10/41/410200188. No way... was it actually demoned away...?"
"We don't know that for sure yet!@k@vS10/62/410100622. Maybe you were just mistaken about where you parked it?"
"Mistaken...? That's impossible...!"
"So, about this car..."
Miyuki-chan stepped in to ask about the shape and model of the car. ...Towada-san's description sounded like something we'd seen before.
"If that's the case, we've seen it.@k@vS10/40/410300449. When we first got here, that car was parked at the bottom of the stone steps, right?@k@vS10/40/410300450. ...Ryuunosuke-san?"
"Yeah, now that you mention it..."
There was a rental minivan parked at the base of the stone steps when we first arrived.
I recalled the terror I felt when I first saw it, wondering if it was another suicide car.
Come to think of it, Miyuki-chan did give it a thorough examination...
Which means... Towada-san's car must've still been there when she came back with the luggage.
At least... that was assuming Miyuki-chan was telling the "truth."
"So... that was your car, right?"
"But when I looked a little earlier, it was gone!@k@vS10/42/410600105. The car was gone, and I didn't understand why...@k@vS10/42/410600106. I got scared... and then... and then...!"
Towada-san clung to her arms and trembled.
"And then...@k@vS10/42/410600108. I heard footsteps...@k@vS10/42/410600109. coming from behind us..."
"...Footsteps?"
*thump*
Just then, I felt like I could hear someone's footsteps coming from behind, so I quickly looked back.
...But there was nobody there. Just the falling rain.
"Even though there shouldn't be anybody else here... I'm certain I heard those footsteps.@k@vS10/42/410600111. Signs of other people!"
*thump*
Footsteps came one after another... seeming to get closer to Towada-san.

"And then, I saw someone standing behind Takumi-kun...@k@vS10/42/410600113. I got scared and ran away.@k@vS10/42/410600114. I ran up the stone steps in a daze.@k@vS10/42/410600115. "Takumi-kun, run!"@k@vS10/42/410600116. In my daze... I... kept on shouting that..."
"But... Kurosawa didn't escape."
"It's not that he didn't try to...@k@vS10/42/410600118. But..."
Rather than reply, Towada-san meekly hung her head. She tried to say something with her head still down, but she struggled to find the words.
Was she really at a loss for words? Or did she just not want to accept what Sonozaki-san said? It was hard to tell.
"...So, what happened to you after that?"
"I...@k@vS10/42/410600120. I ran up the stone steps and waited here for Takumi-kun to arrive. I waited for a long time...@k@vS10/42/410600121. but Takumi-kun never came..."
"...There were probably circumstances that prevented him from coming to help you."
"Could it be...? He was attacked by someone in the shadows...?@k@vS10/41/410200189_1. Then, Kurosawa-san is... already...!"
"We still don't know that!"
Towada-san responded without a moment of hesitation.
"We still don't know, but...@k@vS10/42/410600124. but... but... you wouldn't want to believe that yourself, would you?!"
"That's... That's right..."
That was all Otobe could say, while delicately stepping back.
...I can understand how he feels.
But even if I couldn't believe Kurosawa was attacked, even if I didn't want to believe it... It was the only explanation I could think of.
"Um... Have you considered that Kurosawa-san might've run in the opposite direction?"
"The... opposite direction...?"

"Right.@k@vS10/40/410300455. If Kurosawa-san saw you running up the steps, he might've chosen to run in the opposite direction to draw them away from you...@k@vS10/40/410300456. So, isn't it possible that he ran toward the village?"
"...That's not impossible.@k@vS10/43/410400185. Perhaps I should go check it out?"
After saying that, Sonozaki-san began descending the stone steps. ...But isn't it reckless to ignore the scary things that might be lurking down there?!
"Wait wait wait wait...!@k@vS10/62/410100626. What do you mean, you're going to check it out?!"
"I'm going to see if Kurosawa is wandering around down there somewhere.@k@vS10/43/410400187. ...Well, guess I won't be needing this.@k@vS10/43/410400188. Hold onto this for me."
"Huh?"

Sonozaki-san removed the cloth from her scabbard and unsheathed the sword, then tossed the cloth and scabbard to Otobe. And then she quickly descended the stone steps with the unsheathed sword in hand.
"Please wait!@k@vS10/41/410200194. It's dangerous to go alone! I'll...!"
"...Wait."
"Two is better than one, three better than two, and four better than three...!"
"Arakawa-san...?"
"Wouldn't it be safer if we all searched together?"
I did my best to disguise the pitiful trembling of my hands as I said that.
I heard those unidentifiable footsteps, too.
If I was the only one who heard it, I could say it was all in my head.
But now, Towada-san has heard them too.
And... her boyfriend may have been demoned away by the owner of those footsteps...
Whether that's the truth or not... I can't say for certain.
"...Traveling with that many people will only cause trouble.@k@vS10/43/410400190. I'll be fine, so there's no need to come with me."
"Don't worry."
Sonozaki-san flashed us a thin smile before finally disappearing down the stone steps.
"Ryuunosuke-san.@k@vS10/40/410300459. Something's bugging me..."
When I reluctantly turned back to face everyone, Miyuki-chan was talking to me with an unconvinced expression.
"What's wrong...?"
"When someone is demoned away, it's always...@k@vS10/40/410300461. one person dies, and one disappears, right...?"
"That's true, but... why bring that up?"
"Because there "still" hasn't been a death, right?@k@vS10/40/410300463. So, maybe this hasn't been a case of demoning away after all...?"
Miyuki-chan said that with a serious expression. ...In other words, it seemed like she wasn't attributing this to a "curse" or other supernatural phenomena.
Although, it was hard to tell if she genuinely believed that, or if she was just saying that to comfort me.
And to be honest... this girl was the most "mysterious" thing of all.
She was far too knowledgeable about the history and geography of this village for someone who hastily prepared for this trip.
Plus... when I stumbled upon her belongings in the car, they looked wholly unsuited for magazine coverage.
And even though this was her first time meeting Sonozaki-san, they were both acting like they've known each other for a long time.
And what's even more unnatural is that they seem to know each other, but refuse to speak a single word of it.
What is going on here...?
Who the hell is she?
"Ryuunosuke-san... are you all right?@k@vS10/40/410300465. Your face... is looking pale, you know...?"
"Arakawa-san...?"
Even Otobe was staring anxiously at me.
"Ah... no... I'm fine, I'm fine.@k@vS10/62/410100635. I was just a little lost in thought!"
"Maybe it would be best to return to the assembly hall and take a short rest..."
"I said I'm fine!@k@vS10/62/410100637. Besides... you have a phone! A phone!"
"We should report the missing car to the police!"
"But, my battery is..."
"Maybe there's still a little life left in it?@k@vS10/62/410100640. Besides, Otobe, I noticed that your phone is the new M model that came out last spring."
Otobe's shoulders suddenly started shaking.
I had no idea why Otobe looked so upset, but he was probably just a little scared.
Or maybe he's just the sort of person who's always nervous...?
"...Am I wrong?"
"Ah, no. You're right, but even so..."
"Which means it's the same as Sonozaki-san's."
"Huh? Really?@k@vS10/40/410300468. I didn't notice that!"

"That's an experienced reporter's power of observation for you.@k@vS10/62/410100644. So, Otobe!@k@vS10/62/410100645. If you swap batteries with Sonozaki-san, you should be able to use your phone again, right?"
"Aah, is that so...?"
"Is that so? Hey, you..."
"You're right..."
Otobe's face didn't brighten up at all as he said that.
What on earth is going on...?
...No, that's not all.
Come to think of it, when we first discovered the corpses in the car, Miyuki-chan was hesitant to use her phone, too.
Miyuki-chan and Otobe... Why are they both so opposed to using their phones...?
"...What's wrong?"
"This is bad..."
Otobe turned to me with a sad look on his face after rifling through all of his pockets.
"...Looks like I dropped my cell phone somewhere while we were running here."
"Huuh?!"
"I'm sorry...! I'll go search for it!"
As soon as Otobe said that, he rushed back to the ritual storehouse. ...There was no time to stop him.
"Hey! Be careful, ok?@k@vS10/62/410100650. And if you find your phone, call the police right away!"
"Got it...!"
With Otobe and Sonozaki-san gone, I was left alone with Miyuki-chan and Towada-san...
"What's going to happen... to the rest of us...?"
"I don't know, but...@k@vS10/62/410100652. It's clear that something abnormal is going on here..."
"I can't believe this is actually happening..."
Meanwhile, Miyuki-chan was standing underneath the shrine gate with her arms crossed. ...She bit her nails with an irritated look on her face, like she was thinking hard about something.
Eventually, I heard the sound of footsteps on gravel and the rustling of clothing, indicating that Sonozaki-san had returned.
"Nothing.@k@vS10/43/410400193. ...There's nobody there."
"Nobody...?"
"There was nobody else wandering around.@k@vS10/43/410400195. And after a quick look, I didn't see any footprints or traces of blood either."
"Then... Kurosawa-san really did disappear with the car?"

"It's unfortunate, but that's looking to be the case...@k@vS10/43/410400197. I looked around the surrounding area, but I didn't see any other cars either.@k@vS10/43/410400198. And there were no signs of other people."
"Not even... one other car...?"
"Right."
In response to Sonozaki-san's words, Miyuki-chan turned back toward me.
Come to think of it, what about the car we drove here in...?
"Sonozaki-san, what do you mean there aren't any other cars?@k@vS10/62/410100655. How far did you look?"
"All around this area.@k@vS10/43/410400201. If you want a more specific answer... well, I don't know for certain."
"Umm... you didn't see a huge four-wheel-drive car?@k@vS10/40/410300472. It shouldn't have been parked more than 500 meters from the base of the stone steps..."
"A bulky four-wheel-drive car~?@k@vS10/43/410400203. If a car like that was out there, it really would've stood out."
Miyuki-chan immediately dashed down the stone steps.
That was Miyuki-chan's car.
If it's gone... we've lost our means to go home!
"Means... to go home...?"
Everyone around me looked terrified when they recognized the meaning of the words I muttered.
...Otobe's friends suddenly vanished along with their car.
Towada-san's boyfriend Kurosawa vanished along with their car.
When I put those facts together, I suddenly gasped.
Otobe and Towada-san had already lost their means to go home...!
And the two of them each lost their companions in the process.
"Miyuki-chan...?!"
I rushed down the stone steps while shouting her name.
If things play out according to the rules we've observed thus far, my companion Miyuki-chan and the vehicle I came to the village in will both disappear together...!
"Miyuki-chan...!!"
Miyuki-chan... please be safe...!
I struggled to step forward through the muddy ground.
I ran so hard I nearly tripped over my feet.
After pressing on for a while, I could make out Miyuki-chan's figure.
"Ryuunosuke-san...!"
"Miyuki-chan..."
I felt so relieved, I almost ran up and hugged Miyuki-chan.
...Hold it. Control yourself.
But contrary to the swelling relief in my heart, Miyuki-chan had a troubled light in her eyes.
"...What's the matter?"
"...@k@vS10/40/410300476.It's not here after all."
"Not here...?"
"I mean... our car."

"Maybe... it really was demoned away.@k@vS10/40/410300479. Without our car... we're trapped at this shrine...@k@vS10/40/410300480. There might really be a demon out there murdering us one at a time..."
"M-Miyuki-chan!@k@vS10/62/410100665. D-d-don't say strange things like that!"
"But... even though we're alone in this village, the car still disappeared.@k@vS10/40/410300482. No matter how you think about that, isn't that strange?"
"Well..."
I swallowed my spit in one big gulp.
After confirming my reaction, Miyuki-chan continued.
"Maybe...@k@vS10/40/410300484. this demon might be one of us?"
The "demon" might be one of us? ...She was suggesting that one of us might actually be responsible for these extraordinary circumstances? It did seem plausible.
But... if that's the case, who on earth could it be...?
As I considered that, a chill ran down my spine the moment I looked Miyuki-chan in the eyes.
The emotion I perceived right there was suspicion... and vigilance.
You gotta be kidding me...! Are you even doubting me, Miyuki-chan?!
At the same time, I studied the cold look in Miyuki-chan's eyes.
What did Miyuki-chan mean when she said that...?!
What... should I do...?!
What...?!
"M-Miyu..."
"...It's about time to head back."
Despite the anxiety and hesitation in my voice, Miyuki-chan started heading back in the direction of the shrine.
...We remained silent the entire time climbing the lengthy staircase.
"So... you didn't find the car?"
Miyuki-chan nodded in response to Sonozaki-san.
"That's a shame.@k@vS10/43/410400206. So many friends being demoned away."
Sonozaki-san had an oversized, warped grin on her face. Then she turned around and started walking toward the assembly hall.
"Hey, wait..."
"By the way... do you know what happened to Otobe?"
The moment she pointed that out, I said "Ah!" to myself.
Otobe...?!
Come to think of it, he went off searching for his cell phone and still hasn't returned.
Is someone up to something? What is going on here...?
I still haven't fully grasped the situation yet, but it was clearly dangerous for one person to be moving about on their own.
"Otobe?! Otobee!"
I couldn't picture Otobe as a man-eating demon on the hunt for humans.
So, if Otobe disappears too... then it would mean he was the next victim of being demoned away...!
"Otobe-kuun!"
Then, once Otobe noticed us calling out to him he came running with thunderous footsteps from somewhere not too far away.
"W-what's wrong...?"
"Otobe-kun!@k@vS10/40/410300491. Thank goodness."
"Seriously.@k@vS10/62/410100675. I thought you might've gotten demoned away, too!"
"Ah, really...?@k@vS10/41/410200214. Sorry for making you worry..."
"So, did you find your phone?"
"Yeah..."
"What's the matter...?"
"I found my phone.@k@vS10/41/410200217. But... it was weird..."
"What was weird...?"
Otobe's pupils shook back and forth.
Come on... What is it this time?!
"Arakawa-san.@k@vS10/41/410200219. Please, take a look at this..."
"I only dropped it...@k@vS10/41/410200221. so why did it end up like this...?"
Otobe held out his cell phone as he said that.
It was a flip phone, but the hinge was torn apart, and the LCD screen was smashed beyond repair.
And three of the buttons were completely covered in mud... In other words, the phone was simply no longer usable.
"What is this...?"
Naturally, I couldn't help but tremble.
"What does this mean...?@k@vS10/62/410100681. How did it end up like this...?"
"The only thing I can think of is that someone broke it on purpose..."
"But... why...?"
"Someone did this... on purpose?@k@vS10/42/410600131. It would have to be someone who knew it was Otobe-kun's phone..."
Everyone remained silent. ...Without a proper understanding of the circumstances, we couldn't say anything.
"What are you all so scared about?@k@vS10/43/410400209. You can always just buy another phone or two, right?"
"That's not the issue here... Shouldn't you know that better than anyone?"

"...In this village, all communication with the outside world has been cut off.@k@vS10/62/410100686. And those who try to make contact with the outside are killed in a miserable way...@k@vS10/62/410100687. Haven't you heard that before?"
I held the broken pieces of Otobe's phone out for Sonozaki-san to see.
"What...?@k@vS10/43/410400212. Are you saying I did this?"

"That's not what I'm saying.@k@vS10/62/410100689. But... you must have realized!@k@vS10/62/410100690. This phone was broken to keep us from contacting the outside.@k@vS10/62/410100691. This phone was a metaphor for us... and this was done to make an example!"
"In that case... is this... the curse of the village...?!"
After Otobe said that... we all fell silent.
The next moment, Sonozaki-san burst into laughter.
"Aahahahahahahah!"
"...Don't be ridiculous.@k@vS10/43/410400215. Sorry, but I'm going to get some rest in the assembly hall."
Sonozaki-san grabbed the phone I was holding out, then walked past us and headed toward the assembly hall.
Miyuki-chan gave me an anxious look.
"Ryuunosuke-san... what should we do?"
"What should we do...?"
"Should we head back to the assembly hall, too?"
"Yeah... but..."
After everything that's happened, should we head back to where Sonozaki-san was headed...?
As I pondered that, I felt somewhat lost. And the next moment,
"Umm... sorry, everyone.@k@vS10/42/410600135. This is selfish of me to ask, but... would you mind searching for Takumi-kun a little longer?"
Towada-san said that in an assertive tone, then promptly lowered her head.
"I'll search, too...@k@vS10/42/410600137. If we search this village all night long... I'm sure we'll find Takumi-kun.@k@vS10/42/410600138. I'm sure of it..."
She sternly pleaded with us, betting on the possibility that he was still alive out there.
...I understand how much pain she must be in.
But... can I really believe in that possibility...?
"Please, Arakawa-san.@k@vS10/42/410600140. Please search for Takumi-kun with me."
Towada-san looked up at me and looked directly into my eyes.
A powerful gaze emanated from her huge cat-like eyes, and I couldn't look away.
In the end, I decided to...
"Got it. Takumi Kurosawa... was it?@k@vS10/62/410100695. I'll go see if he's around here."
"Ryuunosuke-san... is that really all right?"
"Th... thank you so much.@k@vS10/42/410600142. That would be a big help..."
Towada-san bowed her head then started leading the way down the stone steps, but I shouted "Wait" to get her to stop.
"W-what is it...?"
"Towada-san... why don't you head back to the assembly hall with Miyuki-chan?"
"Huh...? Why do you suggest that?"
"Being with girls might make it harder to move around.@k@vS10/62/410100698. Plus, we need to be cautious now that we have a missing person on our hands."
"B-but..."
Towada-san appeared discontent.
I understood how she felt. If someone important to me went missing, I'd want to go look for them too.
...But it's the middle of a dark night. Anyone going out in these conditions is likely to get lost, so it would be best to avoid causing another incident.
"Arakawa-san, what about me...?"
"Huh?@k@vS10/62/410100700. Naturally, you're coming with me."
"What are you so afraid of?@k@vS10/62/410100702. ...You're a man, aren't you?!"
"B-but..."
Otobe hesitated, as if to say he wouldn't dare plunge into the danger headfirst.
...But despite that, the fact that he couldn't come right out and say "I don't want to" really got on my nerves.
But then,
"Alright, Ryuunosuke-san.@k@vS10/40/410300499. I'll go search with you!"
While Otobe was still struggling to answer me, Miyuki-chan pushed him aside and stepped forward.
...Is she seriously that bold? She's a courageous woman.
Although...
"No... Miyuki-chan, I need you to stay with Towada-san.@k@vS10/62/410100704. ...Towada-san, don't you think you'd feel more at ease if Miyuki-chan stayed with you?"
Once Towada-san realized it would mean being left here alone, she gazed longingly at Miyuki-chan. When Miyuki-chan saw the pale look on her face, she acquiesced and said, "You're right."
"Understood.@k@vS10/40/410300501. ...Then let's get going, Towada-san.@k@vS10/40/410300502. It's all right... As long as we stay together, there's nothing to worry about."
"...You're right."
Miyuki-chan put a hand on Towada-san's shoulder as they walked to the assembly hall together.
...Towada-san was concerned about her boyfriend's safety, I totally understood that. But this task was far too dangerous to get women involved.
If it's not too late, I'll ask the ladies for help after the sun comes out.
"Let's go, Otobe."
"...Okay."
Otobe reluctantly began descending the stone steps with me.
